curator: auto (generate_day.py — reals verified verbatim vs source + cross-validated)

quotes.text: People think the hardest part of going to the Moon was the launch or the landing. Honestly, it was the three days coming home knowing there was nothing left to do. You run out of tasks and just sit there watching the Earth get bigger, and your brain starts inventing problems.
quotes.speaker: Buzz Aldrin
quotes.context: Recorded conversation featured in the documentary series 'Apollo: Back to the Moon,' National Geographic, 2019
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Buzz frequently described the psychological texture of the mission in ways that surprised people, so a reflection on the return trip is completely in his wheelhouse. The tell is that no such National Geographic series by that exact title exists.

quotes.text: It is clear that we do not have the independent legal authority to enforce this warrant.
quotes.speaker: Zohran Mamdani
quotes.context: NYC Mayor Mamdani backing off his promise to arrest Netanyahu, Tuesday statement

source.title: Politics — Mamdani says he doesn’t have legal authority to arrest Netanyahu

quotes.text: My son came home from school and told me his teacher said the album was a classic. I didn't know how to feel about that. 'Classic' is what they call something when they've stopped being afraid of it.
quotes.speaker: Jay-Z
quotes.context: Profile interview in The New Yorker, conducted by Kelefa Sanneh, published October 2023
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Jay-Z talks about legacy and cultural perception in this slightly wary, cerebral register, and the detail about his son grounds it in his known family life. The giveaway is that Kelefa Sanneh hasn't published a Jay-Z profile at that length in The New Yorker in that window.

quotes.text: I have now come to the conclusion never again to think of marrying, and for this reason; I can never be satisfied with anyone who would be blockhead enough to have me.
quotes.speaker: Abraham Lincoln
quotes.context: A candidly self-mocking line from a young Lincoln's letter, poking fun at his own eligibility as a suitor.

quotes.text: Directing is mostly just deciding who in the room is right and being the last person to admit it. You have a DP who wants one thing and an actor who wants the opposite, and you're nodding at both of them like you already knew this was going to happen.
quotes.speaker: Greta Gerwig
quotes.context: Masterclass Q&A at the Toronto International Film Festival, September 2023
quotes.fake_note: I made this one up — Greta has spoken candidly about the collaborative chaos of directing in a self-deprecating, observational way that matches this tone. The tell is the slight over-specificity of the conflict setup, which is more polished than her genuinely rambling festival answers tend to be.

quotes.text: I am the man who accompanied Jacqueline Kennedy to Paris, and I have enjoyed it.
quotes.speaker: John F. Kennedy
quotes.context: Self-deprecating opening line at a press luncheon at the Palais de Chaillot in Paris on June 2, 1961, during a state visit to France.

source.title: Remarks and Question and Answer Period at the Press Luncheon in Paris | The American Presidency Project
